message:
fix(macros): improve email and URL validation (bd-34uu, bd-17w8)

Email validation now:
- Validates local part character set (RFC 5321)
- Checks for consecutive dots, leading/trailing dots
- Validates domain labels (length, no leading/trailing hyphens)
- Enforces length limits (64 local, 253 domain, 63 per label)

URL validation now:
- Checks for valid host after protocol
- Rejects empty URLs like "https://"
- Rejects whitespace-only hosts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
